reviews.review_description: It was very short but the price matches that. There were a few weird things like all the notes saying the same thing and the torch was really annoying. Pobre clue was barely legible. Having said that I did enjoy the room, a good half hour of fun. Anyone watching you would think you're crazy as you have to do a bit of crawling around, quite entertaining XD

A really enjoyable VR escape room. The atmosphere is great, the puzzles are logical, and it's fun to explore the room looking for clues.

I also liked all the little details and hidden references scattered throughout the environment. Just when I thought I had reached the end, the game still managed to surprise me.

Definitely recommended if you enjoy escape room games in VR.
